title: AI doesn't have to be very good to displace humans
summary: There's an ongoing debate over whether "AI" will ever be good enough to displace humans and, if so, when it will happen. title: Caches: LRU v. random
summary: Once upon a time, my computer architecture professor mentioned that using a random eviction policy for caches really isn't so bad. title: Assembly v. intrinsics
summary: Every once in a while, I hear how intrinsics have improved enough that it's safe to use them for high performance code. That would be nice. Since intrinsics act like normal functions, they can be cross platform.…
